library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, or required environment/system property is needed; the compile failure is from 2.0.0 API changes in the generated tests, not missing setup.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: Use the 2.0.0 API shape in generated tests: org.apache.maven.scm.log.DefaultLog is gone, GitStatusConsumer and GitRemoteInfoConsumer no longer take a logger, and GitRemoteInfoCommand.createCommandLine is an instance method on a command constructed with an environment map. If tests execute real git commit/tag/checkin operations in a temp repository, configure a local git user.name and user.email in that repository; command-construction, consumer parsing, status, and remote-info coverage do not require that.
risks: Tests that execute git commands depend on a git executable being available on PATH, which is normally true on ubuntu-latest but is still host-environment dependent.
Adding an older maven-scm-api to recover DefaultLog would be the wrong fix and could mask or conflict with the 2.0.0 API under test.
A missing SLF4J binding may produce warnings but is not required for compilation or meaningful coverage.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8307 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.scm:maven-scm-provider-gitexe:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
